title: verbascum × angulosum
intro: Verbascum × angulosum, also known as the mullein plant, is a hybrid species of Verbascum, a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of mucilage, a thick and soothing substance. The health benefits of Verbascum × angulosum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × angulosum include teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
